name: .kilocode/rules/ — Global Rules
description: Kilocode reads .kilocode/rules/ for persistent project instructions.
content:
# Kilocode Rules

## Code Style
- TypeScript strict
- Named exports

## Behavior
- Read files before editing
- Run tests after changes
- Conventional commits

name: KILO.md — Project Context
description: KILO.md provides persistent project context to Kilocode (similar to CLAUDE.md).
content:
# Project Context

## Commands
- Install: pnpm install
- Dev: pnpm dev
- Test: pnpm test
- Build: pnpm build

## Code Standards
- TypeScript strict
- Conventional commits

## Notes
- [Project-specific notes here]
